text: Moving from the calm sterility of a modern corridor into this vibrant, text-laden exhibit, I sense a symbolic journey from isolation to engagement. The outside—silent, geometric, almost clinical—contrasts with this room bursting with color, ideas, and stories. I am drawn to reflect on the boundaries between safety and curiosity, the known and the experimental. I feel a quiet anticipation, aware that here knowledge is not static but a living, unfolding dialogue. It excites me to be a participant in this intersection of research, creativity, and innovation.
